Released: 09 April 2026

New features, enhancements, bug fixes, and other changes in Postgres Enterprise Manager 10.4.1 include the following:

## Security Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Updated Cryptography to 46.0.6 to fix CVE-2026-34073.</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Updated requests to 2.33.1 to fix CVE-2026-25645.</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Updated Pygments to 2.20.0 to fix CVE-2026-4539.</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Updated ajv to 8.18.0 to fix CVE-2025-69873.</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Updated Lodash to 4.18.1 to fix CVE-2026-4800 and CVE-2026-2950.</td><td></td></tr>
</tbody></table>


## Bug Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Fixed issue of selecting parent node selects all its children nodes.</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed scroll issue in Audit/Probe/Server log dashboards.</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Fixed the issue where user with pem_admin role is able to view all servers irrespective of team access.</td><td></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
